sources.authority: Office of the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC)
sources.process_step: Regulator source discovery for satellite landing rights, telecommunications service authorization, spectrum and licensing
sources.notes: Pilot access probe on 2026-07-06 returned a Cloudflare challenge page without --fail and HTTP 403 in the monitor. Keep as source-discovery evidence only; do not include in monthly monitoring until a stable document URL or official API is identified.

sources.authority: Office of the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC)
sources.process_step: Service authorization and telecommunications licensing source discovery
sources.notes: Pilot access probe on 2026-07-06 returned a Cloudflare challenge page without --fail and HTTP 403 in the monitor. Need a stable official document URL before monthly monitoring.

sources.authority: Royal Gazette, Secretariat of the Cabinet
sources.process_step: Official publication source discovery for laws, regulations and NBTC notifications
sources.notes: Pilot access probe on 2026-07-06 returned a Cloudflare challenge page without --fail and HTTP 403 in the monitor. Direct PDF URLs may still be usable if discovered separately.

sources.norm: NBTC notice on use of foreign satellite channels for domestic service provision
sources.authority: Office of the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC)
sources.process_step: Foreign satellite channel / landing-rights authorization
sources.notes: Google indexes this as an official NBTC PDF and external web fetch reports application/pdf with 2 pages. Local curl returned HTTP 403 on 2026-07-06, so keep as a core candidate but do not enable monthly monitoring yet.

sources.norm: NBTC guide for preparing information to request use of foreign satellite channels
sources.authority: Office of the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC)
sources.process_step: Application materials for foreign satellite channel authorization
sources.notes: Google indexes this as an official NBTC PDF and external web fetch reports application/pdf with 22 pages. Local curl returned HTTP 403 on 2026-07-06, so keep as a core candidate but do not enable monthly monitoring yet.

sources.authority: Office of the National Broadcasting and Telecommunications Commission (NBTC)
sources.process_step: Background context for satellite internet and Starlink in Thailand
sources.notes: Google indexes this as an official NBTC PDF and external web fetch reports application/pdf with 6 pages. This is background material rather than a controlling regulation. Local curl returned HTTP 403 on 2026-07-06.

sources.authority: Ministry of Digital Economy and Society (MDES)
sources.process_step: Auxiliary legal-source discovery; not yet mapped to satellite landing rights
sources.notes: Pilot access probe on 2026-07-06 returned extractable HTML. The page is a broad law catalog, not yet a confirmed landing-rights regulatory source.

sources.process_step: Landing-rights source discovery; license categories for telecommunications service, radio frequency, satellite communications network/service, and certification
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. This page is the official CRC index for new license applicants.

sources.norm: Satellite communications network establishment, operation and service license page
sources.process_step: Satellite landing rights; satellite communications network/service authorization
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. Use the slug with sulzee, not suljee.

sources.norm: Radio frequency and frequency band use special license page
sources.process_step: Frequency authorization; satellite and satellite mobile radio frequency application materials
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. The page includes satellite communications and satellite mobile sections, legalinfo links, and CRC document/form links.

sources.process_step: Spectrum management and public-use radio frequency authorization context
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. The page states public-use radio frequencies are used through CRC permits/rights under Mongolian law.

sources.process_step: Telecommunications equipment conformity/certification requirements
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. The page lists materials for obtaining and extending conformity certificates.

sources.process_step: Official legal-source catalog for communications, radio waves, permits, and conformity assessment laws
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. The catalog links to legalinfo.mn for the Communications Law, Radio Waves Law, Law on Permits, and conformity-assessment law.

sources.norm: CRC Resolution No. 37/2022 approving satellite communication system frequency allocation and technical requirements
sources.authority: Legalinfo.mn / Communications Regulatory Commission of Mongolia (CRC)
sources.process_step: Satellite frequency allocation and technical requirements
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML. This is directly linked from the CRC radio-frequency license page.

sources.process_step: General telecommunications authority and licensing powers
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML, but the page is large. Keep URL recorded; enable monthly monitoring after deciding snapshot-size policy.

sources.process_step: Radio frequency ownership, allocation, and permit basis
sources.notes: Pilot fetch on 2026-07-06 returned HTTP 200 and extractable HTML, but the page is large. Keep URL recorded; enable monthly monitoring after deciding snapshot-size policy.

sources.process_step: General permit framework for issuance, extension, suspension, restoration, revocation and authorized bodies
